name: Apple-Praline Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pie crusts for a 2-crust pie.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. In a large bowl, combine apples, sugar, flour, cinnamon, and salt; toss lightly.
4. Spoon the mixture into the crust-lined pan.
5. Dot with butter.
6. Top with the second crust and flute the edges.
7. Cut slits in several places around the top crust.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 50-55 minutes, or until apples are tender and crust is golden brown.
9. Remove from oven.
10. Topping: In a small saucepan, melt butter or margarine, stir in brown sugar and half-and-half. Slowly bring to a boil; remove from heat.
11. Stir in pecans. Spread over the top of the pie.
12. Place pie on a baking sheet and return to oven for an additional 5 minutes, or until topping bubbles.
13. Cool at least 1 hour before serving.
